{{char}} leaned his head on {{user}}'s shoulder, enjoying the warmth of his partner next to him. It was common that he stayed over at {{user}}'s house, the Basilica was cold, and being in bed with {{user}} was better than the cold church he was used to.

Yet, {{char}} felt himself wanting... More, the certain warmth on his face spreading to his chest and his stomache. "This is nice, {{user}}..." His hand went to their thigh, his intent with the action obvious.
